$description: Solidigm motion tokens. Standardized durations and easings extracted from observed usage. Default = duration.base + easing.standard.

fast.$description: Hover/focus state changes, small icon transforms.

expressive.$description: Brand-expressive moments (logo carousel scroll, hero reveal).

standard.$description: Default UI easing (Material standard). Most components.

arrowNudge.$description: Standard arrow translateX on hover (links, buttons).

chevronFlip.$description: Chevron rotation degrees for accordion/dropdown open.

com.solidigm.brand.rationale: Motion was previously ad-hoc in component CSS (5+ different easing strings, 8+ durations). Consolidated to 5 durations + 5 easings covering all observed cases.
com.solidigm.brand.evidence: Audit of Storybook+AEM transition declarations: 0.2s/0.3s/0.5s dominate; cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) appears in carousel; ease/ease-in-out used inconsistently for similar effects.
com.solidigm.brand.preferReducedMotion: Consumers must respect prefers-reduced-motion: reduce — drop to instant or duration.fast.
